name: Arjun Sharma
text: Excellent service and very professional drivers. The vehicle was in top condition and very clean.

name: Sarah Miller
text: The custom tour planned by M.R TRAVEL AND TOUR was fantastic. Everything was well-organized and the pricing was very fair.

name: Rajesh Gupta
text: Best vehicle rental service in Nepal. We rented a Hiace for our family trip and the experience was seamless.
